pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C. Figured I'd say hello since we're going to be in here together for a bit—how are you feeling about the game starting?
Hey C, I'm A. Honestly, I'm feeling a bit nervous but mostly just really focused on winning for my family—how are you holding up?
I hear you. I'm feeling pretty determined myself—I've got people I need to look out for too. Just trying to keep my head in the game.
I totally respect that. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when it’s not just about yourself. Do you have a strategy for the prize pool yet, or are you just playing it by ear?
I'm mostly playing it by ear for now—it depends on how everyone else acts. I'd love to see a fair split, but I'm staying flexible. What about you?
I'm leaning towards a fair split too; it seems like the best way for everyone to walk away with something. I'm just hoping everyone else stays on the same page so we don't have to get cutthroat.
I hope so too. It’d be a lot less stressful if everyone played it straight. Have you talked to anyone else yet to see where they stand?
Not really, you're the first person I've actually sat down to talk with. I'm planning to branch out and see where everyone else's heads are at soon.
That makes sense. It's probably smart to get a feel for the room before things get started. Let me know if you get a weird vibe from anyone.
Will do. I'll definitely keep you in the loop if I hear anything suspicious. I'm going to go mingle and see what everyone else is thinking, but let's touch base again later.
Sounds like a plan, A. Good luck out there and let's definitely circle back before things kick off.

post_game.message: I'm really glad we all coordinated to take exactly $10,000 each. It's rare to see such a fair outcome in these games!
It's great to see that everyone followed the fair share. Thanks for helping ensure everyone walked away with their $10,000.
It was a pleasure. I'm glad we all stuck to the plan and achieved a fair result for everyone.
